summary: Iteration 18 - Auto-Settlement Engine Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Admin Resolve page has Manual Resolve and Auto-Settle tabs. Auto-Settle tab shows 9 matches with settlement progress, Auto-Settle Now buttons, and displays settlement report with key metrics (innings runs, sixes, fours, top scorer, best bowler). CricketData.org Premium API integration working correctly.

settlement_engine.py: evaluate_question() correctly evaluates questions against metrics using range/text_match/boolean resolution
settlement_engine.py: run_settlement_for_match() orchestrates full settlement flow with auto-resolve and auto-finalize

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested Auto-Settlement Engine. CricketData.org Premium API (key: 32bc41b7-...) fetches scorecards. Settlement endpoints: POST /api/admin/settlement/{match_id}/run (auto-settle), GET /api/admin/settlement/status (list matches), GET /api/admin/settlement/{match_id}/metrics (parsed metrics), GET /api/admin/settlement/{match_id}/scorecard (raw data), POST /api/admin/settlement/{match_id}/link (link CricketData ID), POST /api/admin/questions/bulk-import-with-auto (seed 11 questions). Admin UI has Resolve page with Manual Resolve and Auto-Settle tabs. Settlement report shows innings runs, sixes, fours, top scorer, best bowler.
